iam_1_unified_identity.title: Unified Identity & MFA
iam_1_unified_identity.description: All users/admins authenticate via centralised identity with MFA. No legacy auth.
iam_1_unified_identity.business_impact: Prevents unauthorized access via weak or legacy authentication

iam_2_least_privilege.title: Least Privilege RBAC
iam_2_least_privilege.description: Identities have minimum permissions. No standing admin roles.
iam_2_least_privilege.business_impact: Limits blast radius of compromised credentials

iam_3_pam.title: Privileged Access Management (PIM)
iam_3_pam.description: Elevated permissions use PIM with approval, justification, expiry.

iam_4_auto_provisioning.title: Auto-provisioned/removed access (Joiner-Mover-Leaver)
iam_4_auto_provisioning.description: Access provisioned/removed automatically via JML processes.
iam_4_auto_provisioning.business_impact: Prevents orphaned access for terminated employees

iam_6_break_glass.title: Break-Glass Accounts
iam_6_break_glass.description: Strong passwords (≥16 chars), monitored, securely stored.
iam_6_break_glass.business_impact: Provides emergency access when primary auth unavailable

iam_8_identity_logging.title: Identity Logging
iam_8_identity_logging.description: Logs retained centrally minimum 180 days, monitored for anomalies.
iam_8_identity_logging.business_impact: Enables audit trail and threat detection

iam_9_access_recertification.title: Access Recertification
iam_9_access_recertification.business_impact: Prevents permission creep and unauthorized access

data_01_classification.title: Data Classification
data_01_classification.description: All data classified (Public/Internal/Confidential/Highly Confidential) with owners.
data_01_classification.business_impact: Enables appropriate protection controls per data sensitivity

data_10_external_sharing.title: Data Sharing Controls
data_10_external_sharing.description: External data sharing encrypted (TLS 1.2+), contractually governed.
data_10_external_sharing.business_impact: Protects sensitive data in transit to external parties

data_11_test_data.title: Test Data Security
data_11_test_data.description: Non-prod must not use production data unless anonymized/masked.
data_11_test_data.business_impact: Prevents accidental data exposure in non-production environments

encryption_at_rest.title: Encryption at Rest
encryption_at_rest.business_impact: Protects data confidentiality if storage is compromised

encryption_in_transit.title: Encryption in Transit
encryption_in_transit.description: TLS 1.2+ for all traffic; no plaintext protocols.
encryption_in_transit.business_impact: Protects data confidentiality during network transmission

backup_security.title: Backup Security
backup_security.description: Encrypted, immutable, geographically distributed, regularly tested.
backup_security.business_impact: Enables recovery from ransomware and disasters

cloud_01_guardrails.title: Azure Guardrails
cloud_01_guardrails.description: Policies enforce logging, encryption, allowed locations, tagging.
cloud_01_guardrails.business_impact: Prevents misconfigured cloud resources at deployment time

cloud_02_private_endpoints.title: Private Endpoints Only
cloud_02_private_endpoints.description: PaaS services use private endpoints; public access disabled.
cloud_02_private_endpoints.business_impact: Restricts PaaS access to private networks only

cloud_03_managed_identities.title: Managed Identities
cloud_03_managed_identities.description: Workloads use Managed Identity instead of secrets/credentials.
cloud_03_managed_identities.business_impact: Eliminates credential management burden and reduces exposure

cloud_04_keyvault_hardening.title: Key Vault Hardening
cloud_04_keyvault_hardening.description: Enforce soft delete, purge protection, private access, rotation, logging.
cloud_04_keyvault_hardening.business_impact: Protects encryption keys from accidental/malicious deletion

cloud_06_cspm.title: Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM)
cloud_06_cspm.description: Continuous scanning for misconfigurations; high/critical issues in SLA.
cloud_06_cspm.business_impact: Identifies and remediates cloud misconfigurations proactively

cloud_08_network_isolation.title: Network Isolation
cloud_08_network_isolation.description: Segmented VNets, deny-by-default NSGs, no open inbound ports.

cloud_09_admin_action_logging.title: Admin Action Logging
cloud_09_admin_action_logging.business_impact: Provides audit trail for privileged operations

CRITICAL.description: Security impact - must be resolved immediately

HIGH.description: Compliance impact - should be resolved within one quarter

MEDIUM.description: Standards deviation - address in next planning cycle
